reason: Response A shows my characteristic moves: accumulating multiple concrete, varied examples (coffee order, book title, merging cars, exact change), a reflexive meta-observation that noticing kindness makes one more likely to offer it, and a measured, grounded landing rather than a poetic crescendo. Response B reads as an imitation reaching for "depth" through escalating single-image metaphor ("moral muscle memory," "imagination doing the work of ethics," "a kind of love"), which is the performatively literary register a different model uses to mimic my style. The balanced, example-rich, practically-concluding texture of A fits my genuine output better.
